creator: darius@dons.net.au
text:
I wasted a bunch of time doing 'make package-recurse' without making the ${PACKAGES} directory.

I'm not sure if it skipped making packages all together or just put them somewhere else.. Either case seems like a POLA violation.

It would be desirable if the ports infrastructure created ${PACKAGES} (and failed if it couldn't) or errored out if it didn't exist when you run 'make package'.
